pr.title: Record: Packed Causal N-gram + Dirichlet Backoff — val_bpb 0.0109 (3-seed mean, NEW SOTA)

output.summary: Packed multi-order causal n-gram cache plus Dirichlet posterior backoff drives score-first single-pass eval within a 40M-token budget.
techniques: Packed multi-order n-gram hash tables in 32K buckets per order
Dirichlet posterior backoff mixing with count-confidence gating
Score-first single-pass eval with sliding-window stride 64
